summaryAm: አናንሲ እና ኤሊ ስለ ፍትሕ፣ ማጋራት እና ደግ ብልሃት የሚማሩበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: ብልሃት ከፍትሕ ጋር ሲሆን ይጠቅማል፤ ጓደኛን መከበር ግን ይበልጣል።

source.name: Traditional African folktale
source.notes: Traditional/public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: አናንሲ በዛፍ ጥላ ሥር ምሳ አዘጋጅቶ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Anansi prepared lunch under the shade of a tree.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Anansi and the Turtle, page 1: አናንሲ በዛፍ ጥላ ሥር ምሳ አዘጋጅቶ ነበር።

pages.textAm: ኤሊው በቀስታ መጥቶ “እኔም ልካፈል?” ብሎ ጠየቀ።
pages.textEn: Turtle slowly came and asked if he could share too.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Anansi and the Turtle, page 2: ኤሊው በቀስታ መጥቶ “እኔም ልካፈል?” ብሎ ጠየቀ።

pages.textAm: አናንሲ ትንሽ ብልሃት አደረገ፣ ኤሊው ግን በጸጥታ አስተዋለ።
pages.textEn: Anansi tried a small trick, but Turtle quietly noticed.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Anansi and the Turtle, page 3: አናንሲ ትንሽ ብልሃት አደረገ፣ ኤሊው ግን በጸጥታ አስተዋለ።

pages.textAm: በሌላ ቀን ኤሊው አናንሲን ወደ ውሃ ዳር ጋበዘው።
pages.textEn: Another day, Turtle invited Anansi to the water’s edge.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Anansi and the Turtle, page 4: በሌላ ቀን ኤሊው አናንሲን ወደ ውሃ ዳር ጋበዘው።

pages.textAm: አናንሲ እንደ ኤሊ ማድረግ እንደማይችል ተረዳ። ኤሊውም “ጓደኞች የእያንዳንዳቸውን መንገድ ይከብራሉ” አለው።
pages.textEn: Anansi realized he could not do everything Turtle could, and Turtle reminded him that friends respect each other's ways.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Anansi and the Turtle, page 5: Turtle kindly reminding Anansi that friends respect each other's ways near the water.

pages.textAm: ሁለቱ ምግቡን በእኩል ለማካፈል ተዘጋጁ። አናንሲ ግን መጀመሪያ መጠበቅን መለማመድ እንዳለበት አየ።
pages.textEn: The two prepared to share equally, and Anansi saw that he first needed to practice waiting.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Anansi and the Turtle, page 6: Anansi and Turtle preparing food to share equally under a tree.

pages.textAm: አናንሲ ምግቡን በጠረጴዛ ላይ አስቀምጦ “እጆችህን ታጠብ” አለ። ኤሊውም በቀስታ ወደ ውሃ ሄደ፣ ግን ሲመለስ ምግቡ ቀድሞ ተጀምሮ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Anansi asked Turtle to wash up, but started eating before Turtle returned.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Anansi at a lunch table while Turtle slowly walks toward water.

pages.textAm: ኤሊው አልተቆጣም፤ በጸጥታ “በሌላ ቀን እኔም እጋብዝሃለሁ” አለ። አናንሲም በደስታ ተስማማ።
pages.textEn: Turtle stayed calm and invited Anansi for another day.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Calm Turtle speaking kindly with Anansi under a tree.

pages.textAm: በውሃ ዳር ኤሊው ምግቡን በቅጠል ላይ አዘጋጀ። “ጓደኛ ሲመጣ ሁለታችንም እንጠብቃለን” አለ።
pages.textEn: At the water’s edge, Turtle prepared food and said friends wait for each other.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Turtle preparing food on a leaf beside a pond while Anansi watches.

pages.textAm: አናንሲ ወደ ውሃ መግባት እንደማይመቸው ተረዳ። ኤሊውም “ሁላችንም የራሳችን መንገድ አለን” ብሎ አስተማረው።
pages.textEn: Anansi learned that everyone has different ways and needs.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Anansi near a pond learning from Turtle with gentle smiles.

pages.textAm: አናንሲ ይቅርታ ጠይቆ ምግቡን በእኩል አካፈለ። ኤሊውም “ብልሃት ከፍትሕ ጋር ሲሆን ያምራል” አለ።
pages.textEn: Anansi apologized and shared equally, learning that cleverness is best with fairness.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Anansi and Turtle sharing food equally under a tree near water.
